stimulus.content: In 1803, President Thomas Jefferson bought a huge area of land from France. This deal, known as the Louisiana Purchase, doubled the size of the United States. It stretched from the Mississippi River to the Rocky Mountains.

stem: What was one major result of the Louisiana Purchase?

choices.text: France gained control of the Mississippi River
The size of the United States doubled
Spain took over the western territories
The thirteen colonies declared their freedom

answer_explanation: The passage states the Louisiana Purchase doubled the size of the United States. France sold the land rather than gaining control, and the colonies had already declared independence decades earlier.
